source.note: Original (answer key) read-only. Its variant axis is variant={mobile,pc-sm,pc-md} x state={unselected,selected,pressed,hover} (9 variants). Rebuilt target keeps its OWN axis (Size/State/Break) for datepicker instance preservation; only interiors copied from original.

target.rebuildMethod: in-place interior rebuild of existing 9 variant components (IDs preserved) to keep datepicker instances bound
target.homePageBefore: ORPHANED (no parent page; getNodeByIdAsync resolved but REST get_screenshot/get_metadata failed; child .remove() was blocked while off-canvas)
target.homePageAfter: Core (5:5706) — appended to page to unblock editing and make verifiable; placed at x=4736, y=140

variants.name: Size=SM, State=Pressed, Break=Mobile
variants.indicator: white1 + gray1 (indicator/default) — GRAY not blue (pressed = gray underline), zone 2px

structureChanges.combineAsVariants: NOT used — set already existed; rebuilt interiors in place to preserve component IDs (and thus datepicker instance bindings)
structureChanges.rename: 508:6857 State property changed Hover -> Pressed (mobile 3rd state corrected to match original). Set State axis now Unselected|Hover|Selected|Pressed.
structureChanges.rootFill: all 9 root COMPONENTs filled with color/navigation/background (was set per original)
structureChanges.pagePlacement: Orphaned set 508:6863 appended to Core page (5:5706) to unblock editing — was off-canvas/no-parent which blocked child .remove(). This is a placement change (set is now visible on Core at x=4736).

textStyleBindings.note: Text typed in Noto Sans KR (Pretendard unloadable in use_figma per project constraint), then setTextStyleIdAsync bound the Pretendard V2.4 style. Renders Pretendard for users with the font.

instances.status: intact, re-rendered correctly (blue bold text + blue 2px underline, stretched to fill)
intact, re-rendered correctly (gray text + gray underline)

datepickerPreservation.note: All 6 datepicker instances stayed bound to the same component IDs (no remap needed since component IDs preserved). Heights updated 30->32 (correct mobile height).

selfCorrection: Original target set 508:6863 was orphaned (no page) which blocked child removal; appended to Core page to make editable. No packing/dimension collapse occurred — set stayed 394x522.

needsDecision.what: A second on-canvas 'Line Tab' set 536:6291 exists on Core (inside Section 'Line Tab' 536:6354) with the SAME old/wrong structure (w76, h30/40, no Pressed state). It was NOT rebuilt — only 508:6863 (the datepicker-referenced canonical set per plan) was fixed.
needsDecision.why: Plan named 508:6863 as the rebuild target. 536:6291 is a separate duplicate (likely the documentation/spec copy). It is now out of sync with the corrected canonical set.
needsDecision.options: (A) Rebuild 536:6291 too to match / (B) Delete 536:6291 and replace with an instance/reference to 508:6863 / (C) Leave as-is (documentation copy)

needsDecision.what: 508:6863 was orphaned (off-canvas). I appended it to Core page (5:5706) at x=4736 to unblock editing/verification.
needsDecision.why: Editing the off-canvas set was impossible (child .remove() blocked). Placing it on a page also lets component-verifier screenshot it.
needsDecision.options: (A) Keep on Core / (B) Move into the existing 'Line Tab' Section 536:6354 alongside the documentation / (C) Move to a different page
needsDecision.default: Currently sitting on Core page at x=4736, y=140 (right of the existing Line Tab section).
